headline: Greedy Algorithms
description: Greedy algorithms make locally optimal choices hoping for global optimum. Fast but require correctness proof. Examples: Huffman coding, Prim/Kruskal (MST), activity selection, fractional knapsack.

citation.name: Introduction to Algorithms (5th Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Cormen T.H., Leiserson C.E., Rivest R.L., Stein C.

citation.name: Greedy Algorithms: Design, Analysis, and Modern Applications (2025)
citation.author: multiple
